values.content:
=Extract invoice information from this document:

Invoice Image:
{{ $binary.attachment.data }}

Extract and return JSON with:
- invoice_number (string)
- invoice_date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- due_date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- vendor_name (string)
- vendor_address (string)
- vendor_tax_id (string)
- subtotal (number)
- tax_amount (number)
- tax_percentage (number)
- total_amount (number)
- currency (string)
- line_items (array of objects with: description, quantity, unit_price, total)
- payment_terms (string)
- purchase_order_number (string if mentioned)
- notes (any additional notes)
- confidence_score (0-100)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Invoice Approval Required - {{ $json.invoice_number }}
=⚠️ Payment Reminders - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.message:
=Dear Finance Team,

Please find the payment reminders for today:

🔴 OVERDUE PAYMENTS ({{ $json.overdue_payments.length }}):
{{ $json.overdue_payments.map(inv => `- ${inv.invoice_number} - ${inv.vendor_name} - ${inv.currency} ${inv.total_amount} (Due: ${inv.due_date})`).join('\n') }}

🟡 UPCOMING PAYMENTS (Next 3 Days) ({{ $json.upcoming_payments.length }}):
{{ $json.upcoming_payments.map(inv => `- ${inv.invoice_number} - ${inv.vendor_name} - ${inv.currency} ${inv.total_amount} (Due: ${inv.due_date})`).join('\n') }}

Please process these payments as soon as possible.

Best regards,
Invoice Processing System
